If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

matchedGroups.title: Home feed, search, favourites, and selection
requiredBehaviors: Home screen renders all sections from repository-backed state.
Favourite section is conditional on non-empty liked list.
Restaurant selection updates shared selection and navigates to detail.
riskHints: Current target home page is already a concentration risk; keep extracted widgets and helpers.
uiContracts: home section order: top, greeting, search, ads, recommended foods, favourites, chips, restaurant list, thank you

matchedGroups.title: History tabs and liked restaurant flow
requiredBehaviors: Liked list renders from shared repository stream.
Selecting a restaurant writes selection then navigates to detail.
riskHints: Source uses pager tabs; target should preserve visible switching even with a different implementation.
uiContracts: search bar plus tabs over liked restaurant content

phaseGroupIndex.title: Platform capability: Media library and album discovery

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.

matrixRows.featureName: Data loading, query, search, filter, or sort behavior (getCustomerInfo)
matrixRows.featurePoint: Data loading, query, search, filter, or sort behavior. Evidence method: `getCustomerInfo`.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `getCustomerInfo` checks `> 50` before all larger thresholds, making `50+` the effective branch for counts over 50.
Manual target review confirmed `common/widgets/restaurant_card.cj::getCustomerInfo` preserves the same branch ordering.
Phase-04 Harmony build rerun on 2026-06-28 succeeded.

Focused target test PASS on 2026-06-28: `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` from `entry/src/test/cangjie` passed `phase04_home_history_discovery_test.cj::restaurantCardCustomerInfoMatchesSourceThresholdOrdering`, confirming the target preserves the source threshold ordering in `getCustomerInfo`.
{'kind': 'manual-review', 'detail': 'The target preserves the source threshold ordering for card rating-count labels.'}

{'kind': 'manual-review', 'detail': 'The translated home route preserves static packaged imagery for ads, categories, favourites, and restaurant cards without widening the phase into media-library or image-viewer behavior.'}
